blocks.content: It wasn't the big things that got you. The waterlogged ceiling, the wallpaper peeling in long strips — Kit walked past all of it.
A pair of children's boots by the back door. Lined up neatly, toes pointing out.
A hook on the kitchen wall with two keys still on it. Just hanging there.
In the living room, a paperback novel left open face-down on the windowsill to keep the page.
Daisy picked up the book. Looked at the cover. Set it back down face-up — differently from how it had been, deliberately.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: All this stuff. They just — walked away from all of it.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Think there's still food in the kitchen?
Kit looked at the boots. Small. A child's size.
Daisy looked at him. Then followed.
